_comment: Executive Project Reporting Dashboard - Data Template
_instructions: Copy this file to src/ReportingDashboard/wwwroot/data/data.json and fill in your project data.

project._comment: Project overview information displayed in the header
project.name: Your Project Name
project.summary: Brief executive summary of the project status (1-2 sentences).

milestones._comment: Key project milestones shown on the timeline. Status: Completed, In Progress, At Risk, Upcoming
milestones.title: Milestone Name
milestones.status: Completed | In Progress | At Risk | Upcoming

shipped._comment: Items completed/shipped this reporting period. percentComplete should be 100.
shipped.title: Item Title
shipped.description: Brief description of what was delivered.

inProgress._comment: Items currently being worked on. percentComplete: 0-99.
inProgress.title: Item Title

carriedOver._comment: Items deferred from previous period. Include carryOverReason.
carriedOver.title: Item Title
carriedOver.carryOverReason: Reason this item was carried over from the previous period.

currentMonth._comment: Monthly summary metrics. overallHealth: On Track, At Risk, Behind
